text.title: clean-architecture Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for clean-architecture as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Domain logic in controller method (email uniqueness check, direct entity construction) instead of delegating to a use case.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Logic in controllers cannot be reused across delivery mechanisms (CLI, event handler, gRPC). Testing requires a running HTTP server. The same rule ends up duplicated in multiple endpoints.

failure-mode.description: Domain entity inherits from SQLAlchemy declarative base or imports ORM columns directly.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The domain entity becomes tied to a specific ORM. Unit tests require a database. Migrating to a different database or ORM forces changes to business rules.
